holdings.infoBox: AVIE is an equity ETF with a total of 366 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 5.30%, Exxon Mobil at 4.76%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 3.74%, Eli Lilly and Company at 3.68%, and Chevron at 2.87%.

overview.description: The Avantis Inflation Focused Equity ETF (AVIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed equity fund of US companies involved in sectors or industries that tend to outperform during periods of inflation. AVIE was launched on Sep 27, 2022 and is issued by American Century Investments.
